title: Red Hat Satellite Host
description: A host registered with Red Hat Satellite representing a physical, virtual, or cloud system managed through the Satellite server. Hosts are the primary managed entities in Satellite, encompassing provisioning, configuration management, content management, and subscription management.

id.description: Unique numeric identifier for the host within the Satellite server.

name.description: Fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of the host.

ip.description: Primary IPv4 address of the host. Not required when using a DHCP proxy.

ip6.description: Primary IPv6 address of the host.

mac.description: Primary MAC address of the host. Required for managed bare metal hosts.

environment_id.description: Puppet environment identifier associated with the host.

hostgroup_id.description: Host group identifier. Host groups provide a template of default settings for hosts.

hostgroup_title.description: Full host group title including parent group hierarchy (e.g., 'Production/Web Servers').

operatingsystem_id.description: Operating system identifier. Required for managed hosts.

operatingsystem_name.description: Operating system name and version string.

architecture_id.description: System architecture identifier. Required for managed hosts.

domain_id.description: DNS domain identifier. Required for managed hosts.

compute_resource_id.description: Compute resource identifier. Null indicates a bare metal host.

compute_resource_name.description: Compute resource name (e.g., VMware vCenter, oVirt, AWS, Azure).

compute_profile_id.description: Compute profile identifier defining virtual machine sizing.

medium_id.description: Installation medium identifier for OS provisioning.

ptable_id.description: Partition table identifier for disk layout during provisioning.

managed.description: Whether the host is managed by Satellite for provisioning and configuration management. Managed hosts have their DNS, DHCP, TFTP, and other infrastructure services controlled by Satellite.

build.description: Whether the host is currently in build mode awaiting provisioning.

enabled.description: Whether configuration management reports are evaluated for this host.

comment.description: Free-form text field for additional information about the host.

uuid.description: Unique identifier from the compute resource (e.g., VMware BIOS UUID).

global_status.description: Numeric global status of the host. 0 = OK, 1 = Warning, 2 = Error.

global_status_label.description: Human-readable label for the global status.

content_facet_attributes.description: Content management attributes from the Katello content facet, describing the host's content view and lifecycle environment assignment.

content_view_id.description: Identifier of the content view assigned to the host.

content_view_name.description: Name of the assigned content view.

lifecycle_environment_id.description: Identifier of the lifecycle environment the host is in.

content_source_id.description: Identifier of the Capsule server providing content to this host.

errata_counts.description: Count of applicable errata by type.

applicable_errata_count.description: Total count of errata applicable to this host.

upgradable_package_count.description: Number of packages with available upgrades.

subscription_facet_attributes.description: Subscription management attributes from the Katello subscription facet, describing the host's registration and entitlement status.

uuid.description: Subscription manager UUID (from rhsm or subscription-manager).

registered_at.description: Timestamp when the host was registered with the subscription service.

last_checkin.description: Timestamp of the host's last check-in with the subscription service.

service_level.description: Service level agreement preference (e.g., Premium, Standard, Self-Support).

release_version.description: Release version preference for the host.

autoheal.description: Whether the host automatically attaches subscriptions when entitlements are insufficient.

registered_through.description: Hostname of the Satellite or Capsule server the host registered through.

interfaces.description: Network interfaces associated with the host.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the host record was created in Satellite.

updated_at.description: Timestamp when the host record was last modified.

installed_at.description: Timestamp when the operating system was installed on the host.

last_report.description: Timestamp of the last configuration management report received from the host.

HostInterface.title: Host Network Interface
HostInterface.description: A network interface associated with a Red Hat Satellite managed host.

ip.description: IPv4 address assigned to the interface.

ip6.description: IPv6 address assigned to the interface.

identifier.description: Operating system device identifier (e.g., eth0, ens192, bond0).

managed.description: Whether DHCP and DNS are managed by Satellite for this interface.

primary.description: Whether this is the primary interface used for FQDN construction.

provision.description: Whether this interface is used for TFTP and PXE provisioning.

virtual.description: Whether this is a virtual interface (alias or VLAN).

mtu.description: Maximum transmission unit size in bytes.

attached_to.description: Parent interface identifier for virtual interfaces.

examples.name: webserver01.prod.example.com
examples.comment: Primary web server for production workloads
